title: Somno's Safety Tools
description: System-agnostic table safety tools for Foundry VTT. Provides player-facing safety card macros for ALL STOP, HAZARD PLAY, and INVOLVE ME, a GM-only Resume Play macro, private GM alerts, player card popups, automatic pause and resume handling, Resume Play chat posting, clean world macro installation for manual hotbar placement, and a startup journal that explains how to use the module. Each user can disable the startup journal from their own module settings.
